chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Applications No. 1513 & 1514 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.3769/2023 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.3770/2023 29.09.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for the applicant The impugned judgment appears to have deal with the LEDs, however, the questions framed for determination are in respect of release of some vehicle. The impugned judgment does not appear to impose any restraint on any vehicle, therefore, the question pleaded do not appear to arise from the impugned judgment. When confronted, learned counsel articulates no cavil to the aforesaid. In view hereof, it is observed that the questions pleaded do not arise from the impugned judgment, therefore, to such extent the reference applications are dismissed. Insofar as merits of the case with respect to LEDs etc. is concerned this order shall have no influence thereupon. Both these reference applications are dismissed. Office to place copy of this order in connected matter. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
